PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel ?percentage WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P30 ?continent .
  VALUES ?continent {
    wd:Q4578 wd:Q36619
  }
  .
  ?country wdt:P1082 ?total_population .
  ?country wdt:P1716 ?indigenous_population .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
  .
  BIND((?indigenous_population / ?total_population * 100) AS ?percentage)
}
